sources.page_title: Menzerna Liquid Matt Fluid Sanding Cream - 1 Litre
sources.cleaned_content:
# Menzerna Liquid Matt Fluid Sanding Cream - 1 Litre

Brand: Menzerna
SKU: MEN-LMATT-1L

Price: £24.95 + vat (£29.94 incl vat)

Stock: In stock

## Description

### Matting paste for surface preparation

Liquid Matt abrasive paste establishes the conditions required for reliable results in repainting and refinishing. This abrasive matting paste facilitates subsequent priming/painting of the vehicle.

Water-based – for mechanical or manual application, this silicone-free formula is bodyshop safe and leaves an even finish creating the optimum conditions for painting.

**Directions:**

- Use: preparing the surface prior to the coating process. The product is a substitute for sandpaper when matting surfaces.
- Apply Liquid Matt to a wet abrasive pad and buff the surface in circular motions.
- Rinse away any residue with water.

Size: 1 litre

Product Images:
- https://www.killerbrands.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/MEN-LIQUIDMATT-1L_800x.jpg?v=1686565137

sources.page_title: Menzerna Liquid Matt | Sanding Polishing Car Abrasive Heavy Compound
sources.cleaned_content:
# Menzerna Liquid Matt (1L)

Brand: Menzerna
Product code: 22763.261.001

Selected Size: 1 Litre

Price: 31.95 (34.39 incl. VAT)

Stock: In Stock

## Fluid Sanding Cream.

Liquid Matt is a specialised product designed specifically to prepare the surface for repainting or for the refinishing of the clear coat. The abrasive cream formulation works like liquid sandpaper to produce a uniform, matte surface.

**Features & Benefits:**

- Works like liquid sandpaper
- Produces a uniformly matte finish easily, even on rounded surfaces

**Technical Specification:**

- Water-based
- Can be used with rotary or dual action machine polisher
- Use with high-density foam cutting pad or lambswool pad
- Can also be used by hand

**Size: 1 Litre**

### Documents

- Menzerna Liquid Matt Technical Data Sheet: /Documents/Menzerna/Menzerna-Liquid-Matt.pdf
- Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS): /documents/MSDS/Menzerna-Liquid-Matt.pdf

Product Images:

# Menzerna Liquid Matt - 1 Litre

Brand: Menzerna

Price: £31.99 (VAT included)

Stock: In stock

## Description

Menzerna Liquid Matt provides an alternative to sanding. This abrasive paste establishes the conditions required for reliable results in repainting and refinishing.

Liquid Matt is water-based and facilitates subsequent priming/painting of the vehicle. It can be used by hand or machine.

This silicone-free formula is bodyshop safe and leaves an even finish creating the optimum conditions for painting.

**Directions:**

- Use: preparing the surface prior to the coating process. The product is a substitute for sandpaper when matting surfaces
- Apply Liquid Matt to a wet abrasive pad and buff the surface in circular motions
- Rinse away any residue with water

Size: 1 Litre

Product Images:
- https://motorsportandspares.com/cdn/shop/products/menzerna_liquid_matt.jpg?v=1666769803&width=800
